Bvishal Oil & Energy IPO Details

Bookbuilding IPO | ₹[.] Cr | Listing at BSE, NSE |

IPO Details
Messages
Docs 
News

Bvishal Oil & Energy Ltd. has filed a Draft Red Herring Prospectus (DRHP) with SEBI on March 31, 2026 to raise funds through Initial Public Offer (IPO).

Bvishal Oil & Energy Ltd. IPO is a Book Build Issue of 2.57 crore equity shares consisting of a fresh issue of upto 1.80 crore equity shares and an offer for sale (OFS) of upto 0.77 crore equity shares.

The equity shares are proposed to be listed on NSE and BSE. Unistone Capital Pvt.Ltd. is the book running lead manager and Bigshare Services Pvt.Ltd. is the registrar of the issue. Key details like IPO dates, IPO price bands and lot size are yet to be announced.
Refer to Bvishal Oil and Energy IPO DRHP  for more details.
